description: Formal benchmark_v1 video set for route evaluation. Relative paths are resolved from the repository root.

scope.purpose: Use one fixed video list and one fixed sampling policy to compare unified fog-model checkpoints across iterations.
selection_rules: Prefer real highway or roadside deployment videos over synthetic examples.
Cover at least light fog, medium fog, patchy/local fog, sparse traffic, and dense traffic.
Once benchmark_v1 is frozen, do not silently replace existing entries; only append new versions under a new benchmark_id.
current_limitations: The current workspace only ships one real fog video, so benchmark_v1 is structurally valid but still under-covered.
Before using the benchmark for thesis-level claims, expand this list to at least 4 to 6 videos.

videos.label: getty_demo_real_fog
videos.notes: Current workspace baseline video. Keep this entry fixed; expand benchmark_v1 by appending more videos instead of replacing it.

videos.label: control_clear_sparse_traffic_day
videos.notes: Real clear-weather control clip built from UA-DETRAC sequence MVI_40152.
